name: Amlodipine
indications:
## Main indications

Hypertension. Calcium channel blocker.

> Adjust according to institutional protocol and medical prescription.

adulto.dose: 5–10 mg/day PO as single morning dose.

pediatrico.dose: Children: initial: 0,06 mg/kg/day (up to 5 mg/day), once daily; maximum dose: 0,6 mg/kg/day (up to 10 mg/day). Adults: initial: 5 mg once daily, maintenance: 5–10 mg once daily.

stability:
## Stability

- Store per package insert, protect from light.
adverseEffects:
## Adverse effects

Palpitations, peripheral edema, headache, dizziness, fatigue, angina, cardiac arrhythmia (rare).
